nasb.text: “If your kinsman, a Hebrew man or woman, is sold to you, then he shall serve you six years, but in the seventh year you shall set him free.

esv.text: “If your brother, a Hebrew man or a Hebrew woman, is sold to you, he shall serve you six years, and in the seventh year you shall let him go free from you.

cnv.text: “你的兄弟，無論是希伯來男人，或是希伯來女人，如果賣身給你，要服事你六年；到第七年，就要讓他離開你得自由。

ccb.text: “如果你们的希伯来同胞，不论男女，卖身给你们做奴隶，他们要服侍你们六年，到第七年，你们要给他们自由。
